message.lc_ftb_hook.insufficient_funds: Not enough money for this action (cost: %1$s, you have: %2$s).
message.lc_ftb_hook.insufficient_funds_b: Not enough money to claim %2$s chunks (cost: %1$s, you have: %3$s).
Not enough money for %2$s chunk claims (cost: %1$s each, you have: %3$s).
message.lc_ftb_hook.insufficient_funds_p: Not enough money to enable this protection. Your change was reverted.
message.lc_ftb_hook.claim_visibility_loc: Claim visibility is always public and cannot be changed.
message.lc_ftb_hook.protection_locked: Your team could not pay upkeep. Protections were reset to the cheapest settings.
message.lc_ftb_hook.protection_unlocked: Your team balance is sufficient again. You may change protections.
message.lc_ftb_hook.protection_locked_ch: Protections are locked until your team can pay upkeep again.
message.lc_ftb_hook.upkeep_paid: Your team paid %1$s for the next %2$s.
message.lc_ftb_hook.upkeep_see_more_hove: Click to view the upkeep breakdown
message.lc_ftb_hook.upkeep_detail.denied: Only team owners and officers can view upkeep details.
message.lc_ftb_hook.upkeep_detail.unavai: No recent upkeep payment to show details for.
message.lc_ftb_hook.team_disband_denied: This LC team is linked to an active FTB party. Disband the FTB party first, or wait for the link to be cleared if the party was already removed.
message.lc_ftb_hook.team_role_change_den: This LC team is linked to an FTB party. Change ranks and members in FTB Teams instead.
message.lc_ftb_hook.party_disband_settle: Party disbanded: Team account held %1$s. %3$s chunks sold for %4$s. You received %2$s total on your personal account.
message.lc_ftb_hook.party_join_claim_ref: Your personal claims were dissolved when joining the party. Refunded %1$s for %2$s chunks.
message.lc_ftb_hook.protection_change_pe: Protection change queued until the next upkeep period.
message.lc_ftb_hook.forceload_change_pen: Force-load change queued until the next upkeep period.
gui.lc_ftb_hook.protection_prices_note: Protection prices are per claimed chunk per %s.
